Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product sold on Fide Tech Solutions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

stockQuantity.description: The number of units currently in stock.

category.description: The category of the product (e.g., Router, Switch).

brand.description: The brand of the product (e.g., Netgear, Cisco).

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Fide Tech Solutions website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

isAdmin.description: Indicates whether the user is an administrator.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents an item in the shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userName.description: The name of the user who placed the order (denormalized).

userEmail.description: The email of the user who placed the order (denormalized).

orderDate.description: The date the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

shippingAddress.description: The shipping address for the order.

orderStatus.description: The current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered).

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the order item.

price.description: The price of the product at the time of the order.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a customer review for a product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

rating.description: The rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comment.description: The text comment provided by the user.

reviewDate.description: The date the review was submitted.

NewsletterSubscription.title: NewsletterSubscription
NewsletterSubscription.description: Represents a user's subscription to the newsletter.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NewsletterSubscription entity.

email.description: The email address subscribed to the newsletter.

subscribeDate.description: The date the user subscribed to the newsletter.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a chat conversation between a user and an admin.

userId.description: The ID of the user in the conversation.

participants.description: An array containing the UIDs of the user and admin.

lastMessage.description: The content of the most recent message.

lastMessageSenderId.description: The UID of the sender of the last message.

isReadByAdmin.description: Indicates if the last message has been read by the admin.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a single message within a conversation.

senderId.description: The UID of the message sender.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

definition.description: Stores product information. Accessible to all users for reading.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Includes denormalized 'isAdmin' for authorization independence. Only the user and admins can access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores items in the user's shopping cart. Only the user can access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: cartItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the cart item.

definition.description: Stores all customer orders in a single collection for admin access.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Stores items within an order. Only accessible via the associated order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order item.

definition.description: Stores user's product reviews. Only the user can access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

definition.description: Stores newsletter subscriptions. Publicly accessible for creation, but restricted for reading and modification.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the newsletter subscription.

definition.description: Marks a user as an administrator. Existence of document indicates admin role.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Represents a chat conversation metadata. Accessible by participants and admins.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conversation.

definition.description: Stores individual messages within a conversation. Accessible only by participants and admins.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conversation.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the category.

params.name: brandId
params.description: The unique identifier for the brand.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support Fide Tech Solutions' e-commerce platform, focusing on products, users, orders, reviews, and newsletter subscriptions. Authorization Independence is achieved by storing the `isAdmin` field directly within the user document, eliminating the need for `get()` calls to determine administrative privileges. This approach ensures atomic operations and simplifies security rules. User-owned data (cart items, reviews) is stored in hierarchical paths under the `/users/{userId}` collection, providing clear ownership and simplifying security rules based on the authenticated user's ID. All orders are stored in a top-level `/orders` collection to allow administrators to efficiently query and aggregate revenue data. The structure supports the required QAPs by segregating data based on access needs. User profiles are stored under `/users/{userId}`, ensuring only the user can access their data. Products are stored in a flat `/products` collection, allowing easy listing and filtering for all users. Admin roles are managed through the `isAdmin` field in the user document and existence check on the `/roles_admin/{uid}` collection, making role verification straightforward in security rules. Newsletter subscriptions are stored in the `/newsletter_subscriptions` collection. The addition of a `conversations` collection with a `messages` subcollection enables a real-time chat feature between users and admins, with rules ensuring only participants can access their own messages. Dedicated collections for `categories` and `brands` are added to ensure data consistency and allow for centralized management.
